hero.title: About Us
hero.description: A leading Palestinian platform that connects professional service providers with people searching for services

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We aim to make high-quality professional services more accessible in Palestine while creating job opportunities for local professionals through a safe and trusted platform.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the first and most trusted platform in Palestine for connecting professional services and supporting the local economy by empowering Palestinian talent.

stats.new_platform_title: A New Platform Growing Every Day
stats.new_platform_description: Join us at the beginning of our journey and become part of the Palestinian professional services community

security.title: Safety & Trust
security.description: We ensure a secure experience by verifying the identity of all service providers

network.title: Wide Network
network.description: Thousands of professional service providers across Palestine

ease.title: Ease of Use
ease.description: A simple and user-friendly interface to quickly find the right service

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph_1: The idea of "Khedemtak" was born from the urgent need for a platform that connects Palestinian talents with people looking for trusted professional services. We noticed that many skilled professionals struggled to reach customers, while people had difficulty finding reliable service providers.
story.paragraph_2: From this idea, we created a digital platform that brings both sides together with a focus on simplicity, security, and quality. We believe technology can serve as a bridge between needs and solutions, and that Palestinian talent deserves a platform worthy of it.
story.new_platform_paragraph: We are at the beginning of our journey and look forward to serving our community while helping Palestinian professionals achieve sustainable income through their skills and expertise.
story.existing_platform_paragraph: Today, we are proud to serve thousands of users and support hundreds of professionals in achieving sustainable income through their skills and expertise.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We build trust through transparency and quality in all our services

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously strive to develop innovative solutions that serve our community

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: We connect people and make communication between service providers and customers easier
